nasb.text: Then the king of Israel said, “Take Micaiah and return him to Amon the governor of the city and to Joash the king’s son;

esv.text: And the king of Israel said, “Seize Micaiah, and take him back to Amon the governor of the city and to Joash the king’s son,

cnv.text: 以色列王說：“把米該雅帶回去，交給市長亞們和王的兒子約阿施，

ccb.text: 以色列王下令说：“把米该雅交给亚们总督和约阿施王子，
